case_title: HAZEL VERA et al VS. SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-23-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERA, HAZEL VERA, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA LESLIE H. SAWYER INSURANCE AGENCY INC. DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-11-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $325.00 AGAINST CHRISTOPHER VERA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-23-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-13-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $325.00 AGAINST HAZEL VERA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-23-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-13-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-11-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-11-2012 AT 2:00 PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
